hooks.comment: Matcher-less: guard script self-filters stdin for git commit/push/merge/rebase, exit 2 = block. Shares .claude/hooks/guard-protected-branch.sh with Claude Code — no logic duplication.

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "=== gongsiri 협업 규칙 요약 ==="; echo "브랜치: feature/<owner>-<scope> | PR → dev | Conventional Commit"; echo "규칙 전문: docs/rules/code-style.md · version-control.md · change-management.md"; echo "main/dev 직접 commit/push/merge 금지"'
hooks.comment: SessionStart: prints a compact docs/rules/ pointer into Codex context — same rule awareness as Claude Code's AGENTS.md, without re-reading every rule file.
